Off Calendar Jan-07-2009 Continued To Feb-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition By Administrator To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution And Instruction Related Thereto.
Off Calendar Dec-01-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Henry Glasser for Bruce Rudolph (Petitioner).

Mr. Glasser informed the Court that Mr. White's objection was settled and presented a copy of Mr. White's Withdrawal of Opposition to the Petition. In addition, Mr. Glasser requested the Court grant the petition and stated that he would be filing a petition for final distribution. The Court granted the petition, (subject to a written order). Status on the filing of the petition for final distribution was set for January 7, 2009.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Leong.

Petition By Administrator To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution And Instruction Related Thereto.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2008 Continued To Nov-12-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition By Administrator To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution And Instruction Related Thereto.
Off Calendar Oct-07-2008 Continued To Oct-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl and Lynn White for Hazel Best. Henry Glasser for the Petitioner.

Mr. Glasser requested a continuance stating that they were hoping to settle the matter. The matter was continued to October 28, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Carl Sauceda, CSR#2031. Clerk: R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
